---
title: "vas_30min"
subtitle: "`vas_30min`"
description: "vas_30min"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/vas_30min/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                     | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                       |
|--------------------------|------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                  | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                |
| `center`                 | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                             |
| `vas_hunger_30min`       | vas_hunger_30min             | number | Visual analogue scale. Hunger at time 30 min Question: Hvor sulten er du?. Slider scale labels: Jeg er slet ikke sulten | Jeg har aldrig været mere sulten        |
| `vas_satisfaction_30min` | vas_satisfaction_30min       | number | Visual analogue scale. Satisfaction at time 30 min Question: Hvor mæt er du?. Slider scale labels: Jeg har et stort hul i maven | Jeg kan ikke få en bid mere ned |
| `vas_full_30min`         | vas_full_30min               | number | Visual analogue scale. Fullness at time 30 min Question: Hvor fyldt op føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Slet ikke fyldt op | Fyldt totalt op                   |
| `vas_how_much_30min`     | vas_how_much_30min           | number | Visual analogue scale. How much to eat at time  30 min Question: Hvor meget tror du, at du kan spise?. Slider scale labels: Slet ingenting | Virkelig meget       |
| `vas_comfort_30min`      | vas_comfort_30min            | number | Visual analogue scale. Comfort at time  30 min Question: Hvordan føler du dig tilpas?. Slider scale labels: Virkelig dårligt | Virkelig godt                      |
| `vas_nausea_30min`       | vas_nausea_30min             | number | Visual analogue scale. Nausea at time  30 min Question: Har du kvalme?. Slider scale labels: Ja, meget | Nej, slet ikke                                           |
| `vas_thirst_30min`       | vas_thirst_30min             | number | Visual analogue scale. Thirst at time  30 min Question: Hvor tørstig føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Overhovedet ikke | Virkelig meget                        |
| `vas_sweet_30min`        | vas_sweet_30min              | number | Visual analogue scale. Sweet at time  30 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget sødt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke | Ja, meget                      |
| `vas_salt_30min`         | vas_salt_30min               | number | Visual analogue scale. Salt at time  30 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget salt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke | Ja, meget                       |
| `vas_fat_30min`          | vas_fat_30min                | number | Visual analogue scale. Fat at time  30 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget fedtrigt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke | Ja, meget                    |

: Fields in the `vas_30min` resource.
